title: Mendingless Netherite
description: This Mod simply removes the ability to add Mending to Netherite.
body:
# Mendingless Netherite

This Mod removes the ability to enchant Netherite. It now needs to be repaired manually.

I know, I know. It is one of the evilest Mods on Modrinth, but still have **fun** with it.
